goal: Find one or more new orthogonal specialist signals or conditioning layers that work where active-signal-v1@1 is absent, prove their additive value, and avoid repeating v1's single-filter event-entry mistakes.
global_constraints: Base active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: no retuning of hours, days, thresholds, or execution rules.
Raw single-filter event-entry constructions (H1/H2 style) are permanently banned.
Every new candidate must first pass complement-first mode before any other evaluation.
Model-first approaches are forbidden until the low-friction Wave A is fully exhausted.
Each prototype must have at least three logical layers: new information layer, regime/state confirmation, and entry-density limiter.
A candidate whose profit vanishes under strict-additive mode is rejected regardless of permissive-integrated performance.

slices.title: Postmortem plan_v1 and fix new rules
slices.hypothesis: Record the specific lessons from the failed v1 cycle so the agent does not repeat the same mistakes under different names, and codify the invariant rules for v2.
slices.objective: Record the specific lessons from the failed v1 cycle so the agent does not repeat the same mistakes under different names, and codify the invariant rules for v2.
success_criteria: Explicit postmortem is recorded and the agent understands v2 is a different research class, not a retry of the same raw ideas.
evidence_requirements: Explicit postmortem is recorded and the agent understands v2 is a different research class, not a retry of the same raw ideas.

slices.title: Build base-absent research surface
slices.hypothesis: Construct an anchor-level map that labels every 1h bar as base-long-fired, base-short-fired, or base-absent, then identify subspaces where the base is silent but the market has directional opportunity.
slices.objective: Construct an anchor-level map that labels every 1h bar as base-long-fired, base-short-fired, or base-absent, then identify subspaces where the base is silent but the market has directional opportunity.
success_criteria: A map of missing regimes exists specifically on the surface where the base does not participate.
evidence_requirements: A map of missing regimes exists specifically on the surface where the base does not participate.

slices.title: Wave A — low-friction new layers on already available data
slices.hypothesis: Select hypothesis families that can be built without heavy external infrastructure, using already available 1h data and minimal new custom features.
slices.objective: Select hypothesis families that can be built without heavy external infrastructure, using already available 1h data and minimal new custom features.
success_criteria: A small but high-quality list of Wave A hypotheses exists, all data-ready or nearly data-ready.
evidence_requirements: A small but high-quality list of Wave A hypotheses exists, all data-ready or nearly data-ready.
